Bash(browser-use --browser real get html 2>&1 | python3 -c "
import sys, re
html = sys.stdin.read\(\)
# Extract text content from articles
texts = re.findall\(r'\(?:aria-label=\\"\([^\\"]{20,}\)\\"|>\([^<]{30,}\)<\)', html\)
results = []
for t in texts:
    text = \(t[0] or t[1]\).strip\(\)
    if text and not text.startswith\('['\) and len\(text\) > 30:
        results.append\(text\)
# Deduplicate
seen = set\(\)
unique = []
for r in results:
    if r not in seen:
        seen.add\(r\)
        unique.append\(r\)
for r in unique[:80]:
    print\(r\)
" 2>&1 | head -100)
Bash(browser-use --browser real screenshot /tmp/x_screenshot.png 2>&1)

Bash(browser-use --browser real get html 2>&1 | python3 -c "
import sys, re
html = sys.stdin.read\(\)
# Find all status links
links = re.findall\(r'href=\\"\(https://x\\.com/[^\\"]+/status/\\d+\)\\"', html\)
# Deduplicate while preserving order
seen = set\(\)
unique = []
for l in links:
    if l not in seen:
        seen.add\(l\)
        unique.append\(l\)
for l in unique[:20]:
    print\(l\)
" 2>&1)
